prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (G63B) 2.0L SOHC 8-valve turbocharged inline-4 with forged crankshaft (85.2mm stroke) and 8.5:1 compression ratio. Upgrade to a Garrett GT2860R-5 turbo (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and HKS SSQV blow-off valve to eliminate compressor surge under 1.5 bar boost.

Fuel System: Replace the stock 360cc injectors with ID1000 (1000cc/min) injectors, paired with a Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump and an AEM 320LPH external lift pump. Install a Tomei 8-point fuel rail and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with 3D ignition mapping for 98 RON fuel compatibility.

Drivetrain: Swap the stock 5-speed F5M42 transmission for a reinforced F5M51 from the Starion/Conquest, paired with a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch (240mm) and a Cusco 1.5-way LSD. Upgrade driveshafts to custom CV-jointed units with chromoly yokes and a PST carbon fiber prop shaft for reduced rotational mass.
estetica: Body: Install a Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit (Tredia-specific) with custom 2-inch flares, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a 3-inch cowl scoop for intercooler ducting. Replace bumpers with OEM Mitsubishi Galant VR-4 front/rear bumpers (1987-1990) for aggressive aero and fog light integration.

Wheels: Enkei PF05RR 16x9.5 +15 (front) and 16x10.5 +25 (rear) in Hyper Black, wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/50/16 (front) and 255/50/16 (rear) tires. Use custom 5x114.3 to 4x114.3 hubcentric spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive stance and clearance.

Interior: Replace stock seats with Bride Zeta III (low-back) in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (deep dish) and a custom bolt-in roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) from AutoPower Industries. Install a Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (boost, oil temp, wideband AFR) in a custom A-pillar pod.
